description: A citizen files a late-night noise complaint. An operator uses noise sensors to verify and identify the source.

nodes.task_description: Receive a noise complaint for the area around '3rd and Elm St'.
Retrieve historical and real-time decibel level readings from noise sensors in that area.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up a chart showing a spike in noise levels starting at 11 PM.

nodes.task_description: Correlate the noise data with a registered event permit, finding an approved construction project that is operating outside of allowed hours.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the likely source of the noise and the violation.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a bylaw officer to the location to address the violation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully dispatches the appropriate enforcement unit.
